content.speakerText: This seems super niche—how’s this useful in real classrooms?
content.speakerTextCn: 这看起来太小众了，实际课堂能用吗？

options.text: It’s only for elite schools with lots of funding.
Actually, it’s designed for under-resourced schools—we’ve piloted it in 3 districts with promising results.
I don’t know, maybe it’s not useful at all.
We’re planning to expand it to universities next year.

content.explanation: 正确答案直接回应了质疑，用具体试点案例证明实用性，符合'用实例证明普适性'的使用说明。选项1是防御性反驳，与场景相反；选项3是消极回避；选项4虽积极但回应的是高等教育问题，而非原问题中的'实际课堂'。

content.speakerText: Could this be applied in higher ed? Your data’s all from high school.
content.speakerTextCn: 这个能用在高等教育吗？你的数据全是高中阶段的。

options.text: No, it’s only meant for teenagers.
We’re planning a follow-up study with undergrads next semester—core principles transfer well.
I think you should do your own research if you’re interested.
High school data is more reliable anyway.

content.explanation: 正确答案展示了研究的延展性并表达开放态度，符合使用说明。选项1是绝对否定，缺乏建设性；选项3是推卸责任；选项4贬低对方观点，不符合专业回应原则。

content.speakerText: This intervention sounds too theoretical—has anyone actually tried it outside the lab?
content.speakerTextCn: 这个干预措施听起来太理论化了——有人在实验室之外试过吗？

options.text: It’s just a model—no one can implement it in real life.
It’s been used in 5 community colleges with improved student participation rates.
Maybe if you had better funding, it would work.
We haven’t thought about real-world use yet.

content.explanation: 正确答案用具体���施案例回应质疑，体现实践价值。选项1和4是消极否认，选项2是合理回应，选项3是归咎外部条件，不符合'避免防御性回应'的原则。
